source: Aggregated from the public-procurement register (АОП/ЦАИС ЕОП) across the 25 МО-group awarder EIKs, all years — contracts whose subject matches an aircraft platform, aero-engine, helicopter or aviation fuel. Spend, not a verdict.
note: The visible cost of keeping the Soviet-era and legacy fleet flying — the sustainment that DOES run through ЗОП, unlike the F-16 acquisition (US FMS). Refresh from the corpus when the МО contracts reload.
